overall.description: First-person exploration through a vibrant neon-lit night market in Cyberpunk 2077, walking past food stalls with red lanterns, navigating narrow alleys with stacked crates, and ascending to an elevated industrial walkway overlooking police barriers below.

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right around stacked crates to approach a round vendor stall with warm lighting. A vendor in a green shirt works behind the counter as the scene transitions from the lantern area to a more open market passage.

segments.scene_description: Returning to the main market corridor, the camera navigates around a red food stall and passes a brightly lit blue food kiosk. The area is moderately crowded with pedestrians moving in opposing directions.

ascending metal stairs to upper industrial level

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow service alley illuminated by pink neon signage, navigating past trash and stacked boxes before ascending a metal staircase to an upper industrial level.

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals an elevated industrial walkway with metal railings overlooking the market below. Police vehicles sit behind glowing blue barriers on the lower level while exposed piping and ventilation ducts line the walls of this upper industrial zone.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a vibrant neon-lit night market that eventually ascends into a cold, industrial overlook. It begins in a covered corridor beneath glowing LED arrays and red paper lanterns, moving past stacked crates before turning toward a warmly lit vendor stall. The camera then drifts through an open market area past a purple-lit zebra-print stall and into a gritty back alley filled with barrel fires and cardboard shelters, before returning to the main thoroughfare to navigate through crowds and brightly lit blue kiosks. As the path narrows, the scene shifts into a service alley illuminated by pink neon signage and cluttered with debris, leading the camera up a metal staircase. Finally, the perspective opens onto an elevated industrial walkway with exposed piping, overlooking police vehicles stationed behind glowing blue barriers on the level below.
